data.name: Consoles_SessionObservedDescription
data.value: Observed child process started by the module. ASLM can keep it visible as a service, but direct stdout/stderr capture may be unavailable for third-party executables.

data.name: Consoles_SessionObservedPreview
data.value: Observed child process. Direct stdout/stderr capture may be unavailable.

data.name: Consoles_UnifiedConsoleForActive
data.value: Unified console for all active modules

data.name: Consoles_UnifiedPreview
data.value: Includes unified logs and completed process history from active modules.

data.name: Consoles_EmptySelectionStatus
data.value: Start or select a module to see console activity.

data.name: Consoles_EmptySelectionDescription
data.value: Console output from module startup, setup, settings sync, services, and run subprocesses will appear here.

data.name: Consoles_Footer_ObservedCaptureNote
data.value: - direct stdout/stderr capture may be unavailable

data.name: Downloads_DetailEmpty_Hint
data.value: Choose a resource family to inspect its variants and details

data.name: Downloads_DetailEmpty_NoBridge
data.value: No installed module currently exposes a downloads bridge

data.name: Downloads_EmptyCategory
data.value: No grouped downloads are available for this category

data.name: Downloads_EmptyFiltered
data.value: No grouped downloads matched the current provider filters

data.name: Downloads_EmptySearch
data.value: No results matched "{0}" on the provider side

data.name: Downloads_CatalogBridgeLoadFailed
data.value: The shared catalog could not be loaded from the installed module bridges.

data.name: Downloads_Status_DetailsLoadFailedFormat
data.value: Details could not be loaded for {0}: {1}

data.name: Downloads_Status_NoPageToOpen
data.value: The selected variant does not expose a page to open.

data.name: Downloads_Status_OpenFailedFormat
data.value: Could not open the selected page: {0}

data.name: Downloads_ChooseVariantHint
data.value: Choose a family, then the exact variant you want.

data.name: Downloads_NoSharedDownloads
data.value: No shared downloads were published by the current modules.

data.name: Home_Card_Runtime_ChildCount
data.value: {0} live child processes inside the ASLM tree

data.name: Home_Card_Runtime_NoChildren
data.value: No managed child processes are currently active

data.name: Home_Card_Runtime_Subtitle
data.value: App process and managed child tree

data.name: Home_Metric_Network_Endpoints
data.value: Open TCP and UDP endpoints in the ASLM tree

data.name: Legal_DocumentsUpdated
data.value: Terms were updated. Review and accept again.

data.name: Legal_Subtitle
data.value: Accept the required terms to use ASLM.

data.name: ModuleUpdate_SelectBranchRequired
data.value: Select a repository branch before checking updates.

data.name: Modules_Empty
data.value: No modules found. Install modules via the Setup Wizard

data.name: Notifications_EmptyMessage
data.value: New ASLM events will appear here

data.name: Notifications_AslmUpdateNotAvailable
data.value: No ASLM update is available right now.

data.name: Notifications_AslmUpdatePrepareFailed
data.value: The ASLM update could not be downloaded.

data.name: Notifications_ModuleNotInstalledMessage
data.value: That module is no longer installed.

data.name: Notifications_EngineUpdateFailed
data.value: The engine update could not be applied.

data.name: Notifications_EngineUpdateNotAvailable
data.value: No engine update is available right now.

data.name: Settings_ApiServer_Description
data.value: Start the local mirror server with ASLM

data.name: Settings_AppChannel_Description
data.value: Release uses stable GitHub releases only. Pre-release also accepts preview releases

data.name: Settings_AutoInstall_Description
data.value: Automatically apply module updates and prepare ASLM builds for the next restart

data.name: Settings_Category_ASLM_Description
data.value: Core ASLM behavior, ports, API, and consoles

data.name: Settings_Category_Account_Description
data.value: Display name used by ASLM and shared with modules

data.name: Settings_Category_Accounts_Description
data.value: ASLM display name, GitHub and Ollama sign-in

data.name: Settings_GitHub_NotConnectedHint
data.value: Connect to raise the API limit from 60 to 5,000 requests/hour

data.name: Settings_GitHub_ConnectPrompt_Message
data.value: GitHub should have opened with a 1-year expiration prefilled. Leave permissions at defaults for public update checks, click Generate token, then paste it here.

data.name: Settings_GitHub_TokenDescription
data.value: Sign in with a personal access token to use the higher GitHub API rate limit.

data.name: Settings_Category_Ollama_Description
data.value: Ollama account sign-in and sign-out controls

data.name: Settings_Category_Personalization_Description
data.value: Theme mode, language, and custom theme settings

data.name: Settings_CheckUpdates_Description
data.value: Allow ASLM to query configured GitHub repositories

data.name: Settings_CompletedConsoles_Description
data.value: Keep finished process consoles visible when individual consoles are enabled

data.name: Settings_ConsolesPage_Description
data.value: Show the built-in consoles page in the sidebar

data.name: Settings_DiscardDialog_Message
data.value: You have unsaved changes in this section. Discard them and switch?

data.name: Settings_DisplayNameDescription
data.value: Name shown in ASLM and shared with modules

data.name: Settings_IndividualConsoles_Description
data.value: Show per-process consoles alongside unified module output

data.name: Settings_ModuleChannel_Description
data.value: Used by modules that follow GitHub releases

data.name: Settings_ModuleNoSettings
data.value: This module has no settings in the current state

data.name: Settings_ModuleUpdateMode_Description
data.value: New module preferences start from this mode; individual modules can override it

data.name: Settings_ModulePortDescription
data.value: Starting port for all modules. Ports are allocated sequentially from this value

data.name: Settings_OllamaSignOut_Message
data.value: This removes the current ollama.com session for this Windows profile. Continue?

data.name: Settings_Personalization_LanguageDescription
data.value: Sets the interface language for ASLM and supported modules

data.name: Settings_Personalization_ModeDescription
data.value: Sets how the app chooses its overall interface appearance

data.name: Settings_Personalization_NoThemes
data.value: No custom themes yet. Create one to use Custom appearance

data.name: Settings_Personalization_SelectThemeActive
data.value: Which saved palette the token rows below belong to

data.name: Settings_Personalization_SelectThemeDescription
data.value: Choose which custom theme is active

data.name: Settings_Personalization_SelectThemeEmpty
data.value: Create a palette first; it will show up here for selection

data.name: Settings_Personalization_ThemesDescription
data.value: Add, bring in, or share palette definitions stored as files

data.name: Settings_SaveMessage_Deferred
data.value:
Settings saved. Some module settings could not be applied immediately and will be retried on next module start
{0}

data.name: Settings_Legal_AutoAcceptUpdates_Description
data.value: Accept new and updated terms after the first review.

data.name: Settings_ThemeDelete_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this theme? This cannot be undone

data.name: Settings_ThemeEditor_BaseDescription
data.value: Built-in semantic defaults for tokens you have not overridden yet

data.name: Settings_ThemeImport_Invalid
data.value: The file is not a valid ASLM theme

data.name: Settings_ThemeImport_TooLarge
data.value: The theme file is too large

data.name: Settings_ThemeNew_PromptMessage
data.value: Enter a name for the new theme:

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_AslmAvailable
data.value: ASLM update {0} is available. Use "Prepare ASLM update" to download it

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_AslmAvailableStaged
data.value: ASLM update {0} is available; {1} is already staged for restart

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_AslmTagPrepared
data.value: ASLM {0} is prepared and will be applied on restart

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_CouldNotPrepare
data.value: ASLM update could not be prepared

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_ModuleUpdatesCount
data.value: {0} update(s) available. Module updates can be applied from the Modules page

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_ModuleUpdatesStagedGeneric
data.value: {0} An ASLM self-update is staged for restart

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_None
data.value: No update check has been run in this session

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_Prepared
data.value: ASLM update is prepared and will be applied on restart

data.name: Settings_UpdateStatus_PreparedWithVersion
data.value: ASLM update {0} is prepared and will be applied on restart

data.name: SetupWizard_DockerDescription
data.value: ASLM needs the Docker CLI. Install Docker Desktop, then tap Next

data.name: SetupWizard_FastSetupHint
data.value: Fast Setup uses your Windows username and default settings
